Greetings in the Name of Christ! Guilford County Board of Commissioners & Guil-
We are writing to invite you and your child to participate in an upcoming Confirmation class for the area
United Methodist Churches. Confirmation is a time of exploration, learning, and growing for middle and high
school aged children. We will study the Christian faith, and particularly what it means to be United Method- In Memory of Joe & Ollie Bouldin
ist. The class will begin mid-January and conclude at Pentecost in May. William & Michael Johnson
Made by: Larry & Jo Carol Dobbins
As a confirmand, your child will have a mentor to talk and pray with during the journey. We will explore
topics such as creation, redemption, and the church. We will practice how to develop habits of discipleship Hoyt & Kay Nichols
and talk about the way of salvation. We will also explore how to live out our faith in the world, day by day. 11:00 am Paul & Sherry Thomas Made by: Upper Reflections Sunday school class
Since confirmation is such an important time of formation in the life of your child and the church, there will Gary & Marcia Guffey
be the following expectations: In Memory of Walter Stanley Ed & Carolyn Lawrence
-Each confirmand: Made by: Vicki Causey Harold & Martha Shives

confirmand is responsible for arranging a time to cover the material with his/her mentor or pastor. STAFF

I would first like to thank you all so much for making me feel so welcomed! My heart has been
overwhelmed with the kindness & love I have felt from AUMC. I feel very honored & blessed
Thank you for the memorial to the church budget in honor of
with this opportunity being your new Office Administrator! I was born and raised in
my sweet Mom. She was a dedicated church member and loved
Texarkana, TX. My husband and I have 6 boys, they range in age from 9 yrs. old to 20 yrs. old.
her church. Thank you for honoring her in this way.
I worked previously as a Recruiter/Operations Manager within the Staffing Industry. I loved
Thank you for the prayers & cards you sent us in November. The
my career, however the work load was tremendous and the hours were very long. My husband
meal after the memorial service was delicious & much appreciat- 01/02 Sharon Hoover 01/18 Marilyn Holtham
and I made a decision three years ago to place our youngest three sons in a Christian school. ed. thank you so much for all your love and kindness. 01/02 Don Miller 01/19 Bert Stone
Sincerely, With this change in schools for our children I was ready to make changes all around. We spent
Cheryl & John & Susannah a lot of time in prayer that God would lead me to a new career so that we could have our boys
remain in their school. God lead me to AUMC and I am so thankful to Him for answering my
prayers. It is truly a blessing to come to work and know I am surrounded by brothers and
sisters in Christ! I am so thankful to be here & hope to meet each one of you in the future. May The family of Mike Johnson acknowledges with deep apprecia-
tion your kind expression of sympathy. God Bless you all.
Thank you so much for the donation to the Columbarium fund.
When Mike heard about this project being started at the church, he
became in favor of it. This is where he hopes to be placed when it
is completed. I know he is appreciative.
Becky Johnson 01/07 Marsha Sparks 01/23 Christa Webster
